heading: Regulatory process
label: 1531 Regulatory process
text: Each agency shall, unless otherwise prohibited by law, assess the effects of Federal regulatory actions on State, local, and tribal governments, and the private sector (other than to the extent that such regulations incorporate requirements specifically set forth in law).
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 104–4, title II, § 209109 Stat. 67Mar. 22, 1995“This title [enacting this subchapter] and the amendments made by this title shall take effect on the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Mar. 22, 1995
